subject: {rival} scouting {player}
body:
Our sources report that {rival} has been scouting {player} in recent matches. This usually precedes a transfer approach.

We should decide on our stance before they make a move.

es.subject: {rival} ojea a {player}
es.body:
Nuestras fuentes informan que {rival} ha estado ojeando a {player} en partidos recientes. Esto suele preceder a un acercamiento de traspaso.

Deberíamos decidir nuestra postura antes de que se muevan.
